description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian dressed in a full-body hooded jumpsuit with a fitted waist and multiple utility pockets. The individual wears a mask with exaggerated facial features, reminiscent of a clown, and has black gloves and boots. The jumpsuit is accessorized with a harness system that crosses the chest and back, and there are visible pouches and holsters attached to the legs and arms. The figure's face is mostly obscured by the hood and mask, giving it a mysterious and somewhat intimidating appearance. The overall attire suggests a utilitarian or protective purpose, possibly for hazardous environments or urban exploration.
description: An adult pedestrian in a hooded jumpsuit with a mask, harness, gloves, and boots, featuring utility pockets and pouches. The figure has a distinctive, masked face and a utilitarian, protective appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the masked face, hood, chest harness, utility pockets, and gloves clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, mask, arm pouch, and holster on the thigh.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back harness, fitted waist, rear pockets, and the full length of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile of the mask, hood, arm pouch, and thigh holster.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body hooded jumpsuit with utility harness, gloves, and protective mask
